message:
chore(beads): track rfft norm parity task (franken_numpy-1nir)

Sync the beads tracker with the rfft parity work landed alongside this
commit. The issue stays open at priority P2/in_progress because the
rfft surface still needs the out= keyword, complex-typed inputs, and
multi-axis rfftn variants covered before we can close it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
